extracted_information: This document provides a comprehensive review of the top age verification API providers in 2025. Age verification APIs are crucial for industries dealing with age-restricted content, goods, or services to ensure compliance with regulations, protect minors, prevent identity fraud, and build customer trust. The selection methodology involved an in-depth analysis of identity verification providers, examining industry listings and reviews on reputable platforms like G2, Capterra, and Trustpilot, and shortlisting based on features, accuracy, ease of integration, and compliance with regulatory standards. Key factors to consider when choosing an age verification API provider include compliance with regulations (e.g., GDPR), accuracy (low error rates, differentiation of real/fraudulent IDs), ease of integration (good API documentation, smooth integration), scalability (handling high volumes), and data security (encryption, minimizing privacy risks).

providers.name: HyperVerge
providers.description: An AI-powered digital identity solution offering ID verification, age verification, biometric authentication, and liveness detection. Allows building no-code workflows on HyperVerge ONE platform.
providers.technical_implementation: Verifies age in less than 20 seconds using ID check and selfie capture. Utilizes accurate OCR technology for document data extraction and matching. Employs advanced algorithms for precise deepfake detection.
security_measures: Safeguards from identity fraud through biometric authentication
Eliminates bad actors with high real-time confidence score via deepfake detection
compliance_capabilities: Meets global KYC and anti-money laundering regulations
providers.accuracy: 95%+ processing rates; Over 99% facial recognition accuracy

providers.name: Jumio
providers.description: Leading provider of AI-powered identity verification and authentication solutions.
providers.technical_implementation: Leverages cutting-edge biometric facial recognition and AI technology. Verifies age by validating user's ID and confirming its authenticity with a selfie.
security_measures: Ensures secure and compliant customer onboarding

providers.name: Ondato
providers.description: Provides digital identity verification and KYC compliance solutions.
providers.technical_implementation: Utilizes AI to verify user identities through photo and document checks, including date of birth information, verified against databases. Combines document verification and age estimation based on facial authentication.

providers.name: Veriff
providers.description: Global identity verification company providing advanced solutions for online security and compliance. Leading innovator in age verification and KYC automation.
providers.technical_implementation: Uses a combination of artificial intelligence and machine learning. Supports over 10,000 ID documents across more than 190 countries and in 45 languages. Utilizes facial biometric verification for age estimation without ID.
features: ID document verification (checking document validity, extracting DOB)
Age validation (grants access to age-appropriate users, denies underage)
Age estimation (low-friction approach using facial biometrics)
providers.accuracy: Successfully verifying 95% of users on the first attempt

providers.name: Trulioo
providers.description: Provides age verification services to a global clientele. Its platform GlobalGateway is a leader in identity verification.
providers.technical_implementation: Verifies age by validating government-issued IDs, extracting the date of birth, and ensuring the document’s authenticity. Provides real-time verification results.
features: Global coverage (supports identity data from various countries)

providers.name: Onfido
providers.description: Offers digital identity verification and authentication solutions with document verification and biometric authentication.
providers.technical_implementation: Verifies age against comprehensive databases in 160 countries, including voter registers, consumer credits, and utility databases. Provides quick and efficient verification.

providers.name: Token of Trust
providers.description: Identity verification and trust solution to help businesses build secure customer relationships. Provides automated age verification that integrates smoothly with leading platforms.
providers.technical_implementation: Integrates with platforms like Shopify and WooCommerce. Analyzes a person’s face to estimate their age without human intervention.
features: Set minimum age (tailorable to business requirements)
Automated decisions (filters users based on reliable data)

providers.name: Incode
providers.description: At the forefront of identity and age verification services with machine learning technologies. Its flagship provider is Incode Omni.
providers.technical_implementation: Facilitates rapid identity verification using advanced AI/ML algorithms. Estimates user age with a live selfie. Offers AI-powered data verification technology for government-issued IDs. Provides customizable verification flows.
features: Customizable verification flows (identity verification, risk control, authentication, secure identity database storage)

providers.name: SurePass
providers.description: Digital identity verification and onboarding solutions provider focusing on API-based offerings.
providers.technical_implementation: APIs are easy to integrate. Enables remote onboarding through video-based KYC, including live facial recognition, age verification, and document verification. Supports real-time verification for multiple documents.
features: Real-time verification (for identity documents, driving licenses)

providers.name: Persona
providers.description: Digital identity verification platform offering a comprehensive suite of tools, highly customizable.
providers.technical_implementation: No or low-code integration. Allows automated government ID upload and capture. Processes selfies using sophisticated facial recognition technology for age estimation. Conducts checks against integrated databases.
features: Automated government ID upload and capture
Selfie capture with advanced facial analysis (estimates age)
Integrated database checks for age verification and identity
compliance_capabilities: Allows tailoring verification processes to meet specific needs and compliance requirements

start_plan.details: Free one-month trial, seamless integration in less than four hours

grow_plan.details: Includes all Start plan features, custom workflows, view and manage document processing

enterprise_plan.details: Includes all Grow plan offerings, collaborative tools, custom pricing structure, dedicated support

pricing.Jumio: Custom pricing that fits different business needs

Ondato.age_verification_api: Custom pricing plan, starting from $0.11 per client

pricing.Trulioo: Customized pricing for age verification API
pricing.Onfido: Custom pricing for identity and age verification
pricing.Incode: Custom pricing for age verification API
pricing.SurePass: Custom pricing for all its API offerings

statistics.Veriff_verification_success_rate: 95% of users on the first attempt

geographical_data.Veriff_document_support: Over 10,000 ID documents across more than 190 countries and in 45 languages
